title: Monte Carlo Simulation
mermaid: graph TD A1[Define Problem & Parameters] --> B1["/\"Specify Probability Distributions\" (Yellow)/"] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1[Generate Random Samples] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1["/\"Number of Samples Sufficient?\" (Yellow)/"] style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 -- Yes --> E1[Evaluate Model with Samples] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 -- No --> C1 style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> F1[Aggregate Results] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 --> G1{Calculate Statistics (Mean, Variance, CI)} style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 G1 --> H1[Estimate Value & Uncertainty] style H1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff H1 --> I1[Present Results] style I1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff I1 --> J1[End] style J1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff subgraph "Initial Steps" A1 B1 end subgraph "Iterative Process" C1 D1 E1 end subgraph "Analysis and Reporting" F1 G1 H1 I1 J1 end
entities: /Specify Probability Distributions (Yellow)/) style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1[/Generate Random Samples (Green)/
/Number of Samples Sufficient? (Yellow)/) style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 -- Yes --> E1[/Evaluate Model with Samples (Green)/
/Calculate Statistics (Mean, Variance, CI) (Yellow)/} style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 G1 --> H1[/Estimate Value & Uncertainty (Blue)/
